chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P. No.D-1158 of 2020 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(s) For orders on office objections. For hearing of M.A. No.5729/2020. For hearing of main case. 05-09-2023 Ms. Razia Ali Zaman Patoli advocate for the petitioners. Mr. Rafiq Ahmed Dahri, Assistant Advocate General. ---- The impugned order only intend to execute the decree/modified decree in respect of plot No.84 having an area of 1950 sq. ft. through Mukhtiarkar (Revenue) Sinjhoro. Nothing is said about plot No.83 if at all an independent area is occupied by the judgment debtor. No interference as such is required in respect of impugned order. The petition merits no consideration and is accordingly dismissed. J U D G E J U D G E Irfan Ali
